programs.title: How To Fall In Love By Christmas
programs.desc: (G) Nora tries to save her lifestyle brand by writing a column about trying to fall in love by Christmas. With help from a handsome photographer, Nora learns the magic of Christmas.

programs.title: Merry And Bright
programs.desc: (G) As CEO of her family's candy cane company, Cate reluctantly teams up with consultant Gabe to save the business. Soon, they discover they have more in common than just business.
